posts.title: Flight-level email activity tables
posts.details:
We need to see email performance broken down by individual flights (sends), not just rolled up at the campaign level. This would help us understand which specific emails performed best so we can optimize our campaigns.

Currently, we see aggregate opens/clicks for the entire campaign, but we send 5-10 emails per campaign and need to know which ones are actually driving engagement.

comments.value: This is critical for us. We currently have to export CSVs and manually analyze in Excel, which takes hours every week.
Yes! We've been asking for this since we started using Feathr. It's frustrating not to have this visibility.
Would love to see this in the dashboard AND be able to export it. Both are important for different workflows.

posts.title: Lookalike audience attribution in Pixl Plus reports
posts.details: When we run lookalike audience campaigns through Pixl Plus, we can't see which conversions came from the lookalike audiences vs. other targeting methods. Need attribution reporting that shows performance by audience type (retargeting, lookalike, prospecting, etc.).

comments.value: We're spending significant budget on lookalike campaigns and can't measure if they're actually working. This is a major gap.
Our executive team is asking for ROI on our lookalike spend and we literally can't provide it. Need this ASAP.

posts.title: Browser language auto-translation for donation forms
posts.details:
Our donor base is international and we need donation forms to automatically detect browser language and display in the donor's preferred language. Currently we have to create separate forms for each language which is a maintenance nightmare.

Would love to see integration with Google Translate or similar service where we provide translations once and the form automatically displays in the right language based on browser settings.

comments.value: This would be huge for us. We operate in 8 countries and maintaining 8 versions of every form is killing our team.
Givebutter and Donorbox both have this feature. We're considering switching if Feathr doesn't add it soon.

posts.title: Granular content editor role permissions
posts.details:
We need a role that can edit email content and landing pages but cannot view or manage audiences, person records, or reports. Currently the Content Editor role has too many permissions for our security requirements.

Use case: We have contractors who help write email copy but shouldn't have access to our donor database or financial reports. Right now we either give them too much access or make them work outside the system.

comments.value: This is a security issue for us. We can't give contractors access to donor data but we need them to write email copy. Huge blocker.
All of our enterprise customers ask about this during sales calls. It's a common requirement for larger organizations with compliance needs.

posts.title: Email template library with folders and tags
posts.details:
We have 50+ email templates and it's impossible to find the right one. Need a template library with:
- Folders/categories
- Tags for easy filtering
- Search by template name or content
- Ability to mark favorites

Right now everything is in one flat list and it takes forever to find what we need.
